# Upstream Source: brand

Original upstream folder:

`https://github.com/nextlevelbuilder/ui-ux-pro-max-skill/tree/main/.claude/skills/brand`

Expected local source path when the upstream submodule is available:

`external/skills/ui-ux-pro-max-skill/.claude/skills/brand`

## Purpose

Upstream brand guidance for identity, tone, and visual system decisions used by the UI/UX Pro Max skill family.

## Terranex usage

Use only as a reference for brand consistency. Terranex must remain a professional investment operating system, not a decorative real estate brochure, crypto dashboard, or generic SaaS theme.

## Runtime boundary

This folder is reference material only. Do not import it into React runtime code or package it into the app bundle.
